canonical_question: What does MiFID II require — best execution, reporting, inducements ban, product governance?
aliases: MiFID II compliance requirements for investment firms
EU Markets in Financial Instruments Directive obligations
MiFID II best execution and transaction reporting rules
constraints: EU/EEA jurisdiction only — UK follows separate FCA regime post-Brexit
MiFID III transposition deadline 29 Sep 2025 — verify NCA status before relying on new provisions
Article 2 exemptions for commodity dealers, own-account dealers, central banks
Product governance proportionality varies by instrument complexity
MiFIR transaction reporting interacts with EMIR and SFTR — check precedence per instrument type

skip_this_unit_if.condition: UK-based firm subject to FCA regulation only
Needs UCITS or AIFMD fund management rules
Needs only market abuse rules (insider dealing, market manipulation)

related_to.label: EMIR derivatives reporting obligations that interact with MiFIR transaction reporting

often_confused_with.label: UK onshored MiFID regime — diverging from EU MiFID II post-Brexit
Market Abuse Regulation (MAR) — separate regime for insider dealing and market manipulation

inputs_needed.question: What type of entity is the firm (investment firm, credit institution, trading venue, systematic internaliser)?
options: Investment firm providing portfolio management or independent advice
Investment firm providing non-independent advice or execution-only services
Trading venue operator (regulated market, MTF, OTF)

inputs_needed.question: Which investment services does the firm provide?
options: Execution of orders on behalf of clients

inputs_needed.question: What are the firm's client types?
options: Mix of retail and professional clients
Predominantly professional clients and eligible counterparties

applies_to.user_segment: Investment firms, credit institutions, trading venues, systematic internalisers in EU/EEA
applies_to.context: EU financial markets regulation governing authorization, conduct of business, market structure, and investor protection
